case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $20,000.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 301, CLAIMANT, JASON MAR WONG'S NOTICE OF GENERAL AND SPECIAL DEMURRER TO THE PETITION FOR FORFEITURE CONTINUED FROM SEP-02-2008 TO LAW AND MOTION AT SEP-09-2008, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 301 PER STIPULATION.
ORDER OVERRULING CLAIMANT JASON WONG'S GENERAL AND SPECIAL DEMURRER TO THE PETITION FOR FORFEITURE
LAW AND MOTION, 301, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF JASON MAR WONG, OFF CALENDAR PER REQUEST OF THE MOVING PARTY.

LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS : CLAIMANT JASON WONG'S GENERAL AND SPECIAL DEMURRER TO THE PETITION FOR FORFEITURE IS OVERRULED. THE PETITION ADEQUATELY ALLEGES A CONNECTION BETWEEN THE PROPERTY AND A VIOLATION OF SECTION 11378. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
